channel.title: data science on
channel.description: Recent content in data science on

item.title: Data science and machine learning at first
item.description:
Initial impressions on data science and machine learning (All posts in this blog may not reflect true scientific value, since they are merely reflecting my opinions and views on certain matters at the time it was written.)
Objective: register some of my understanding on those topics at the moment, the beggining of my more in-depth learning journey. Reason: since I’m on a journey towards learning all I can about the subjects, I want to be able to compare my initial understanding with my future understanding.
